# **\--Darfaries Interface--**

* # Isekai History

  * Created by the Buhraies as an enhancement to their own Soul Energy interface in an attempt to control Darfaries as a versatile foot soldier army.  
  * You can use a knife to access the Buhraies interface, bypassing the guardrails.

* # Soul Energy to Spell Conversion

  * Soul Energy conceptualizes a spell using logograms derived from the shared knowledge of nearby individuals.

* # Sigil Rings

  * A ring used to bring forth spells. It uses logograms to cause Soul Energy to mutate and perform the desired action of the caster.  
  * Most known soul energy interfaces and actions, such as healing, reviving, and elemental, can be bought at any Soul Energy shop.  
  * Blank sigil rings are forbidden to prevent accidents.  
  * \*Except Courtroom scientists, and Aquamarine/Sapphire Adventurers who can experiment with new Soul Energy interfaces.

* # Interface Shells

  * When casting spells, five rings will appear in the hand holding the spell.   
  * Each tier holds a limited number of Soul Energy tiers.

| Shell Name | \# of Tiers |
| :---- | :---- |
| I (smallest closer to hand) | 2 |
| II | 8 |
| III | 18 |
| IV | 32 |
| V (largest farthest from hand) | 50 |

# 

  # 

* # Objects

  * ## Simple

    * ?

  * ## Compound

    * This is where some progress has been made in extending the interface framework\! Nobody has successfully transformed the OBJECT and VERB structure of the interface—but they have been able to increase the information density of the object while retaining consistent casting.  
    * It has been a while since Forway approved a new compound object for sigil rings. There is a single requirement, but succeeding is incredibly tough\!   
    * It is a simple trial in which random passersby are asked to use the experimental sigil ring. If any result is a miscast, the compound object is not approved.

* # Verbs

  * ## Nominal

    * ?

  * ## Variants

    * ?

* # Casting Spells

* ## **Summary**

  * You select the spell, then apply energy into it and release it.  
    * **Subject**: The target of the spell.  
      * No subject indicates a fallback to a person's mindset regarding how Soul Energy should apply itself.  
        * Miscasts will result in an explosion of soul flame in the hands of the caster.  
    * **Verb**: The change being applied.  
      * No verb indicates a fallback to a person's mindset regarding what Soul Energy should do.  
        * Miscasts will result in an explosion of soul flame in the hands of the caster.

* ## **Step 1- Apply Desired Spell**

  * See Language \> Darfaries Interface Language

  * ### Option A) Apply Sigil

  * ![][image1]

  * ### Option B) Drawn Logograms

  * **Forway considered banning the non-logographic use of this interface in the early 800 A.G., but the pushback from the scientific community was too strong. The community opinion shifted in the early 900 A.G. after many scientific tragedies happened without clear progress. Going into the late 900s A.G., only fringe scientists like Gabiro Sundeath (also known as Gabiro Sanbi Royal) still seemed to be investigating it.**  
  * ![][image2]

* ## **Step 2 \- Start Spell**

  * Clench the fingers in the hand where you hold the Spell & Soul Energy.   
  * The Darfaries Shells will appear when you clench your fingers.

  * ### Option A) Apply Sigil

  * ![][image3]

  * ### Option B) Drawn Logograms

  * **Forbidden usage within city/kingdom perimeters due to explosion/miscasts risks.**  
  * ![][image4]  
  * 

* ## **Step 3 \- Soul Energy Infusion**

  * For the Cast Hand to suck energy, the caster must “eat” with the hand.  
  * Spells are only stable around each Soul Energy tier, so energy being fused will always infuse into the next tier of energy. Or apply the difference to the next tier if a partial charge was applied.

  * ### Option A) Use someone’s Soul Energy.

    * When the person touches the middle and ring fingers, the Buhraies veins in their hand light up with Soul Flame. On the other hand, “eats”, the flames are absorbed.  
  * ![][image5]

  * ### Option B) Use Nari Stone

  * Nari stone follows the usage tier. 1 stone for level 1\. 2 Stones for level 2\. 4 stones for level 3, etc…  
  * Upon use, the Nari stone becomes diamond-like as the blue hue fades.  
  * ![][image6]

* ## **Step 4 \- Apply Soul Energy**

  * Touch the object you wish to apply the Soul Energy to with the palm of your hand and straighten your fingers out. (or release your spell as is for ranged attack)  
    * \*For additional range, cook your arm and time it right to add further momentum.  
    * **\*The caster’s body will feel the weight of the spell like firing a gun.**  
  * ![][image7]

# 

# **\--Verbs--**

# **Entangle**

* **Isekai History**  
  * And we haven’t even touched Gabiro’s most profounding research yet\! Entangle\! He was the one who brought back that invention from the history books\! Most of you here don’t use it day-to-day, but it’s a fundamental tool for the adventurers and guards who protect us\! Many tried to bring that back, but the side effects were always too strong\! But Gabiro knew it\! He knew how it worked in principle far better than any of us and brought it back\!  
* **Applications**  
  * It is mainly used to entangle the sounds coming into people’s ears so they all hear the same thing. Can be overwhelming. Sounds echo when people are close to each other. Can make distinction non-voices sounds location harder

# 

# **Transmute**

* **Isekai History**  
  * There’s something about Buhraies that they were either able to be more efficient about or something else they used about this interface that gave them a leg up. Forway officiated the Transumute symbol purely to help advance research efforts.  
* **Applications**  
  * Active research is being conducted to figure out how Buhraies used this to shape the land and do all kinds of shit with it. Some researchers think they can outright generate gold with it, which seems possible, as some people have transmuted the following, albeit it just does not make much economic sense.  
    * Manganese \-\> Iron  
    * Iron \-\> Cobalt  
    * Cobalt \-\> Nickel  
    * Nickel \-\> Copper  
    * Copper \-\> Zinc  
    * Gold \-\> Mercury  
    * Platinum \-\> Gold

# 

# **\--Cat. Soul--**

# **Soul Create (Book I Chapter I Gabiro’s version)**

**\* Known as Uncontrolled Create in a faint rumor among researchers**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * Create a desired soul with specific soul genetic information, using flesh as the base.  
    * Incantation attempts to visualize the target and to think aloud about its characteristics.   
  * A lack of proper concentration and sufficient Nari power caused all the soul and body genetic information to suddenly meld, triggering a White Hole event.  
    * All the Soul Recharges fused into a single being.  
  * In the white hole event, a nearly decayed soul (Harry) was bound by pure chance.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image8]  
* **Tiers**  
  * Increase the soul qualities of the summon according to the power used, and flesh. The % increase is divided by multiple skills. Also, de-age the target soul.

# **\--Cat. Body--**

Body Manipulation soul energy interface actions are rather easier to perform, but can be risky if the caster is unaware of the side effects. Some individuals might develop additional side effects not listed here.

# **Body VERB**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * **INCREASE/DECREASE**  
    * The whole body is increased/decreased.  
  * **REPEL/ATTRACT**  
    * Target will repel/attract other bodies. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
  * **RESTORE/DISASSEMBLE**  
    * Soul energy uses the target’s soul genetic information to identify what is currently discrepant in the target’s body and attempts to correct it using stored energy to fuel bodily changes.  
      * Lost limbs can be placed close to the body so that regeneration does not take as much energy.  
      * Severe damage will cause the body to use a lot of energy to heal.  
    * If no genetic information remains, see the Soul Category or other interfaces for options.  
    * If the target has died and the heart hasn’t come back, apply Storm Create at Tier II or more, depending on how fat the person is.  
    * This does not address external factors causing damage, such as worms.  
      * Merely restores the base genetic info.  
    * Black Honey, or other energy-dense food, must be given to the target if health regeneration is not taking place.  
    * Disassembly attempts to explode the body.  
  * **CREATE/DESTROY**  
    * Creates attempts to recreate the body of the target, born at the site where the spell was initiated.   
      * Black Honey needs to be fed to clone it. It will be lifeless unless the original is killed, since only one entity can connect to a respective soul. Cloning yourself reduces lifespan and increases cancer rates due to linkage to the soul being forced to decrease in density, so it is heavily discouraged.  
    * Attempt to destroy the whole body of the target by explosion. Only causes internal/external bleeding on lower tiers. Medium tiers can cause convulsions, and on higher tiers, it causes an explosion.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image9]  
* **Tiers**  
  * See General Power Effects  
    * \*Kg of mass affected  
  * Overall:  
    * **Tier I:**   
      * Useful for bruises  
    * **Tier II:**    
      * Useful for minor cuts & Minor loss of blood  
    * **Tier III:**   
      * One or two deeper cuts & Minor loss of blood  
    * **Tier IV:**   
      * Minor broken bones & Medium loss of blood  
    * **Tier V:**   
      * Multiple broken bones & Major loss of blood  
    * **Tier VI:**   
      * Legs/Arms missing  
    * **Tier VII:**   
      * Head missing  
    * **Tier VIII:**  
      * Torso Missing  
    * **Tier IX:**  
      * Health Regeneration becomes near instantaneous if you have enough fat/black honey to use for healing, that is.

# 

# **{BodyPart} VERB**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * **INCREASE/DECREASE**  
    * The body part is increased/decreased.  
  * **REPEL/ATTRACT**  
    * Target will repel/attract the specified body part. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
  * **RESTORE/DISASSEMBLE**  
    * Restore attempts at specific body part restoration.  
      * More info on Body VERB  
    * Disassembly attempts to explode the body.  
  * **CREATE/DESTROY**  
    * Creates attempts to create the chosen body part on target as if it had always existed there. Black Honey needs to be fed to increase the part.  
    * Attempt to destroy the specific body part on target by explosion.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image9]  
* **Tiers**  
  * See General Power Effects  
    * \*Kg of mass affected

# 

# **\--Cat. Material--**

Material Manipulation is an experimental research branch from Darfaries with the intention of manipulating the world around. Using

# **World VERB**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * **INCREASE/DECREASE**  
    * Target is increased/decreased. Weight remains the same because density increases.  
      * If density increases too much, the item shrinks into infinity—and disappears forever.  
    * Can affect an item negatively if density matters/disrupts the item’s function.   
    * Can transform a metal into other metals through fusion, but it tends to explode most of the time.  
  * **REPEL/ATTRACT**  
    * Target will repel/attract everything around (but gravity still affects the object.) If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
  * **RESTORE/DISASSEMBLE**  
    * Restore does not put stuff back together from its pieces; it just seems to make the object appear newer. Same for disassembling as in it rusts an item.  
      * It’s basically the reverse of chemical reactions.  
  * **CREATE/DESTROY**  
    * Create does nothing.  
    * Destroy explodes the target into a shower of extremely fine particles and gas—basically a fine dust. On lower levels, it might just destroy the outer shells of said object.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image10]  
* **Tiers**  
  * See General Power Effects  
    * \*Kg of mass affected

# **{Object} VERB**

**\*Can also be used as Uncontrolled Create as a faint rumor among certain researchers, but it also increased its potential gains/risks.**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * **INCREASE/DECREASE**  
    * Target is increased/decreased. Weight remains the same because density increases.  
      * If density increases too much, the item shrinks into infinity—and disappears forever.  
    * Can affect an item negatively if density matters/disrupts the item’s function.   
    * Can transform a metal into other metals through fusion, but it tends to explode most of the time.  
  * **REPEL/ATTRACT**  
    * Target will repel/attract everything around (but gravity still affects the object.) If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
  * **RESTORE/DISASSEMBLE**  
    * Restore shapes the item to the desired object by combining elements around the caster.  
      * It’s basically the reverse of chemical reactions.  
      * \*You need to have the elements that compose it nearby to increase the odds of getting what you want. Otherwise, the repaired object might break again if the newly made connections aren’t strong.  
  * **CREATE/DESTROY**  
    * Create attempts to create objects from the target using all elements around.  
      * \*You need to have the elements that compose it nearby to increase the odds of getting what you want.   
    * Destroy explodes the target into a shower of extremely fine particles and gas—basically a fine dust. On lower levels, it might just destroy the outer shells of said object.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image10]  
* **Tiers**  
  * See General Power Effects  
    * \*Kg of mass affected

# **\--Cat. Elemental--**

**Spell within the category can be either released into an object, or released on air or as a projectile if you cock your arm back and release the spell when pushing it forward.**

# **Fire VERB**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * **INCREASE/DECREASE**  
    * Behaves as Create/Destroy  
  * **REPEL/ATTRACT**  
    * Target will repel/attract the specified element. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
  * **RESTORE/DISASSEMBLE**  
    * Infuse elements into the target from the surroundings, or explode elements out of the target into the surroundings.  
  * **CREATE/DESTROY**  
    * Create a ball of the element for a ranged attack. Otherwise, destroy the target's element back into virtual particles. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image11]  
* **Tiers**  
  * See General Power Effects  
    * \*Cm

# **Water VERB**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * **INCREASE/DECREASE**  
    * Behaves as Create/Destroy  
  * **REPEL/ATTRACT**  
    * Target will repel/attract the specified element. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
  * **RESTORE/DISASSEMBLE**  
    * Infuse elements into the target from the surroundings, or explode elements out of the target into the surroundings.  
  * **CREATE/DESTROY**  
    * Create a ball of the element for a ranged attack. Otherwise, destroy the target's element back into virtual particles. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image12]  
* **Tiers**  
  * See General Power Effects  
    * \*Cm

  * **RESTORE/DISASSEMBLE**  
    * Infuse elements into the target from the surroundings, or explode elements out of the target into the surroundings.  
  * **CREATE/DESTROY**  
    * Create a ball of the element for a ranged attack. Otherwise, destroy the target's element back into virtual particles. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.

# **Wind VERB**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * **INCREASE/DECREASE**  
    * Behaves as Create/Destroy  
  * **REPEL/ATTRACT**  
    * Target will repel/attract the specified element. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
  * **RESTORE/DISASSEMBLE**  
    * Infuse elements into the target from the surroundings, or explode elements out of the target into the surroundings.  
  * **CREATE/DESTROY**  
    * Create a ball (more elongated than anything) of the element for a ranged attack. Otherwise, destroy the target's element back into virtual particles. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image16]  
* **Tiers**  
  * See General Power Effects  
    * \*Cm

# **Ash VERB**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * **INCREASE/DECREASE**  
    * Behaves as Create/Destroy  
  * **REPEL/ATTRACT**  
    * Target will repel/attract the specified element. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
  * **RESTORE/DISASSEMBLE**  
    * Infuse elements into the target from the surroundings, or explode elements out of the target into the surroundings.  
  * **CREATE/DESTROY**

    * \*Cm

# 

# **Gravity VERB**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * **INCREASE/DECREASE**  
    * Behaves as Create/Destroy  
  * **REPEL/ATTRACT**  
    * Target will repel/attract the specified element. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
    * This is the one meant for Gravity Control.  
  * **RESTORE/DISASSEMBLE**  
    * Behaves as Create/Destroy  
  * **CREATE/DESTROY**  
    * Create a ball of the element for ranged attack\*. Otherwise, destroy the target's element back into virtual particles. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
      * \*Due to Hawking radiation, the black hole quickly disappears upon casting.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image24]  
* **Tiers**  
  * See General Power Effects**.**   
    * \*Kg of mass affected

# **Water Gravity VERB**

* **Scientific Notes**  
  * Improved by Gabiro when he helped shape the new Darfaries Interface standards  
  * **INCREASE/DECREASE**  
    * Behaves as Create/Destroy  
  * **REPEL/ATTRACT**  
    * Target will repel/attract the specified element. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
    * This is the one meant for Gravity Control.  
  * **RESTORE/DISASSEMBLE**  
    * Behaves as Create/Destroy  
  * **CREATE/DESTROY**  
    * Create a ball of the element for ranged attack\*. Otherwise, destroy the target's element back into virtual particles. If no target is specified, the soul flame will simply evaporate.  
      * \*Due to Hawking radiation, the black hole quickly disappears upon casting.  
* **Interface**  
  * ![][image25]  
* **Tiers**  
  * See General Power Effects**.**   
    * \*Kg of mass affected
